purpose: Report-only planner output: a directed acyclic graph of next-step blocker burn-down beads derived from the standalone forge owner-action ledger plus live host-dependency blocker action rows. The planner does NOT auto-create beads — agents read this DAG, decide which entries are still needed (deduping against any open `br list`), and create those beads manually via `br create`. Keeping planning separate from tracker mutation prevents stale duplicates after a peer beat the planner to a fix.

nodes.suggested_title: Burn down host-libc NEEDED libraries from the standalone artifact
nodes.first_safe_action: Audit release link flags and crate profile settings to remove host runtime NEEDED edges that should not appear in the standalone artifact.
nodes.exit_criteria: scripts/check_standalone_replacement_artifact.sh shows no host libc.so / ld-linux entries under DT_NEEDED.

nodes.suggested_title: Eliminate direct host DT_NEEDED edges (separated from ldd resolution)
nodes.first_safe_action: Split direct DT_NEEDED cleanup from ldd cleanup and remove direct ld-linux/libgcc/libc edges introduced by upstream tooling.
nodes.exit_criteria: objdump -p artifact has no DIRECT host runtime entries; transitive resolution still tolerated until the next node closes.

nodes.suggested_title: Force ldd-resolution proof to remove transitive host edges
nodes.first_safe_action: Force the ldd-resolution proof to distinguish direct dependencies from transitive load-time resolutions and remove every transitive host edge.
nodes.exit_criteria: ldd artifact reports zero host paths; only owned object paths resolve.

nodes.suggested_title: Inventory and own CRT / init / fini / loader startup obligations
nodes.first_safe_action: Inventory the owned CRT, init/fini, and loader startup obligations that must replace ld-linux when the artifact is loaded standalone.
nodes.exit_criteria: Owned _start / _init / _fini bound to the artifact; no ld-linux PT_INTERP entry.

nodes.suggested_title: Burn down replacement-forbidden host libc call-throughs
nodes.first_safe_action: Burn down replacement-forbidden host libc call-throughs and keep replacement_proofs evidence current per call site.
nodes.exit_criteria: Every libc-surface ABI symbol resolves inside the standalone artifact OR is documented as out-of-scope with a closure rationale.

nodes.suggested_title: Separate libgcc_s NEEDED + GCC version blockers; trial owned compiler runtime
nodes.first_safe_action: Separate libgcc_s NEEDED and GCC version-node blockers, then test an owned compiler runtime (or compiler-rt-equivalent) for the surface area FrankenLibC actually exercises.
nodes.exit_criteria: Standalone artifact links without libgcc_s.so.1 NEEDED edge AND no GCC_X.Y verneed.

nodes.suggested_title: Decide owned-unwinder vs unwind-disabled standalone mode
nodes.first_safe_action: Decide whether standalone replacement mode provides owned unwinder entrypoints or compiles with panic=abort and forbids `_Unwind_*` references.
nodes.exit_criteria: Standalone artifact has zero undefined `_Unwind_*` references OR documents the owned unwinder used; bd-juvqm.4 covers the experiment scaffold.

nodes.suggested_title: Add or eliminate unresolved GLIBC-versioned symbol edges
nodes.first_safe_action: Add or eliminate unresolved GLIBC-versioned symbol edges through the ABI surface so the standalone link does not refer to host glibc symbol nodes.
nodes.exit_criteria: Every undefined GLIBC_x.y symbol is either provided by the standalone artifact (with version_script entry) or removed from the call-graph.

nodes.suggested_title: Trace and replace __tls_get_addr edge through owned TLS startup
nodes.first_safe_action: Trace the __tls_get_addr edge from startup/TLS support and add owned TLS access shims, OR mark the offending modules as TLS-disabled for L1 standalone.
nodes.exit_criteria: Standalone artifact has zero undefined __tls_get_addr / __tls_get_offset references; bd-juvqm.5 covers the experiment scaffold.

nodes.suggested_title: Partition GCC and GLIBC version requirements by provider
nodes.first_safe_action: Partition GCC and GLIBC version needs by provider, then remove host-provided requirements that should be owned by the standalone artifact instead.
nodes.exit_criteria: objdump -p shows zero GLIBC_x.y / GCC_x.y verneed entries pointing at host providers.

regeneration_note: When `standalone_forge_blocker_owner_action_ledger.v1.json` or `standalone_host_dependency_probe_plan.current_forge_blocker_projection.blocker_action_required_rows` adds, removes, or renames a `blocking_reason`, regenerate this manifest by re-deriving the DAG node set and keeping `source_commit` current. The harness checker fails closed when the DAG node set drifts from either the static ledger blocker set or the live action-row set, so atomic regeneration is enforced. Do not delete nodes — replace with `deprecated_at_commit` field if a blocker is permanently retired.
